title: millettia oraria
intro: Millettia oraria, also known as Indian milk bush, is a plant species native to tropical Africa that belongs to the pea family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Millettia oraria include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for oral consumption, and can also be used topically in the form of a paste or ointment.
